Green (cooking) apples line the road at the Yadkinville Rd. entrance to Greenbrier Farm neighborhood. Not for eating out of hand. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

Along Silas Creek Greenway, a persimmon tree between the paved greenway and the creek, fairly close to Burkeshore Rd. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.
